query: A test for the invoice generation feature is failing. The test expects 'Invoice #1234 created' but now we changed the message to 'Invoice created successfully.'
expected_behavior: Flags this as a potential Stale Test — the test may be asserting on outdated product behavior
Does not automatically update the test to match the new message
Asks the user to confirm which is correct: the new message or the old one
Explains the risk of blindly updating the test: it could mask a real regression
Only updates the test after the user confirms the new message is the correct product behavior
